channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Breaking News: Lindsey Graham’s sister, Darline Graham, said…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: Lindsey Graham’s sister, Darline Graham, said she would run to succeed her late brother as a senator in South Carolina.
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: Lindsey Graham’s sister, Darline Graham, said she would run to succeed her late brother as a senator in South Carolina.

item.title: Three new women’s world records have been set at the Lumberj…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Three new women’s world records have been set at the Lumberjack World Championships, which were held over the course of three days in a small Wisconsin community

item.title: 【今日の天気予報】 連休明けの今日21日(火)は西日本や東日本は太平洋高気圧に覆われます。昼間は体温並みの非常に厳しい暑…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【今日の天気予報】
連休明けの今日21日(火)は西日本や東日本は太平洋高気圧に覆われます。昼間は体温並みの非常に厳しい暑さとなる見込みです。 万全な熱中症対策が欠かせません。北日本は前線の影響を受け、雨の降るところがある見込みです。沖縄は夏空が続きます。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
【今日の天気予報】
連休明けの今日21日(火)は西日本や東日本は太平洋高気圧に覆われます。昼間は体温並みの非常に厳しい暑さとなる見込みです。 万全な熱中症対策が欠かせません。北日本は前線の影響を受け、雨の降るところがある見込みです。沖縄は夏空が続きます。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...

item.title: An Army veteran was targeting ICE when he set a fire, ignite…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: An Army veteran was targeting ICE when he set a fire, ignited fireworks and waved an air rifle at passers-by outside a building in Lower Manhattan in an attack targeting federal immigration authorities, law enforcement officials said.
item.content:encoded: An Army veteran was targeting ICE when he set a fire, ignited fireworks and waved an air rifle at passers-by outside a building in Lower Manhattan in an attack targeting federal immigration authorities, law enforcement officials said.

item.title: After being launched in the air by a bison while visiting Ye…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: After being launched in the air by a bison while visiting Yellowstone National Park with his grandson, Carl McDaniel recounts what happened as he recovered from his injuries in footage posted by Bozeman Health. https://cnn.it/4vCIUtG
item.content:encoded: After being launched in the air by a bison while visiting Yellowstone National Park with his grandson, Carl McDaniel recounts what happened as he recovered from his injuries in footage posted by Bozeman Health. https://cnn.it/4vCIUtG

item.title: US defense contractors will have to map out critical supply …

item.description: US defense contractors will have to map out critical supply chains to identify sources in adversary countries under a new White House order signed Monday

item.title: In the temporary restraining order, a US judge says Paramoun…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:

item.title: 【目の紫外線対策👀】 各地で梅雨明けが発表され、夏本番の強い日差しが照りつける季節がやってきました。 UVカットが不十…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【目の紫外線対策👀】
各地で梅雨明けが発表され、夏本番の強い日差しが照りつける季節がやってきました。
UVカットが不十分なサングラスでは、かえって目に届く紫外線量が増えてしまうことも。
サングラスの選び方から"目の日焼け"の応急処置まで、詳しく解説します。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
【目の紫外線対策👀】
各地で梅雨明けが発表され、夏本番の強い日差しが照りつける季節がやってきました。
UVカットが不十分なサングラスでは、かえって目に届く紫外線量が増えてしまうことも。
サングラスの選び方から"目の日焼け"の応急処置まで、詳しく解説します。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [第241話]ダンダダン - 龍幸伸 | 少年ジャンプ＋ ダンダダン 龍幸伸 <毎週火曜更新！最…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第241話]ダンダダン - 龍幸伸 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ダンダダン 龍幸伸 <毎週火曜更新！最新2話無料>TVアニメ第3期 制作決定！　幽霊を信じないオカルトマニアの少年・高倉と、宇宙人を信じない少女・綾瀬は、互いの理解を超越した圧倒的怪奇に出会う――…！オカルティック青春物語!! [JC25巻9/4発売予定]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第241話]ダンダダン - 龍幸伸 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ダンダダン 龍幸伸 <毎週火曜更新！最新2話無料>TVアニメ第3期 制作決定！　幽霊を信じないオカルトマニアの少年・高倉と、宇宙人を信じない少女・綾瀬は、互いの理解を超越した圧倒的怪奇に出会う――…！オカルティック青春物語!! [JC25巻9/4発売予定]

item.title: These towels are tengui, traditional Japanese cotton cloths …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: These towels are tengui, traditional Japanese cotton cloths that come in a variety of colorful patterns and get softer and better with each use. nyti.ms/3T1eFzi

item.title: President Donald Trump vowed that Iran “will pay” for killin…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: President Donald Trump vowed that Iran “will pay” for killing three US soldiers in recent days, even as mediators proposed a new truce as the Middle East war widens further
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump vowed that Iran “will pay” for killing three US soldiers in recent days, even as mediators proposed a new truce as the Middle East war widens further

item.title: In April, three Texas teenagers jumped from a railroad track…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description:
In April, three Texas teenagers jumped from a railroad track bridge into a massive lake that’s popular for recreational sports.

The death of Daniel Erving, 18, has left his family searching for answers and raised questions about water safety at the lake.
item.content:encoded:
In April, three Texas teenagers jumped from a railroad track bridge into a massive lake that’s popular for recreational sports.

The death of Daniel Erving, 18, has left his family searching for answers and raised questions about water safety at the lake.

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー 解説「照らす技術」をRubyで照らす #kanrk09 - Harukasan-dot-dev 解…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
解説「照らす技術」をRubyで照らす #kanrk09 - Harukasan-dot-dev

解説「照らす技術」をRubyで照らす #kanrk092026年7月20日 7月18日(土)に大津市伝統芸能会館で開催された関西Ruby会議09にて、「『照らす技術』をRubyで照らす」という題で登壇させていただきました。今回の発表はデモが多く、スライドもアニメーションを多用しておりそのまま公開するのが難しいです。また、発表中にふ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
解説「照らす技術」をRubyで照らす #kanrk09 - Harukasan-dot-dev

解説「照らす技術」をRubyで照らす #kanrk092026年7月20日 7月18日(土)に大津市伝統芸能会館で開催された関西Ruby会議09にて、「『照らす技術』をRubyで照らす」という題で登壇させていただきました。今回の発表はデモが多く、スライドもアニメーションを多用しておりそのまま公開するのが難しいです。また、発表中にふ...

item.title: From Lebanese-influenced dishes, the citrusy flavors of the …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: From Lebanese-influenced dishes, the citrusy flavors of the coastal regions, the almighty torta and the myriad ways that corn can be transformed, here are 23 traditional Mexican dishes that tell the story of this beloved cuisine's history: https://cnn.it/4bRLpkO
item.content:encoded: From Lebanese-influenced dishes, the citrusy flavors of the coastal regions, the almighty torta and the myriad ways that corn can be transformed, here are 23 traditional Mexican dishes that tell the story of this beloved cuisine's history: https://cnn.it/4bRLpkO

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com Roy Cooper’s Senate campaign ma…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

Roy Cooper’s Senate campaign may offer Democrats “a lesson about the effectiveness of politicians who don’t fashion themselves as revolutionaries, don’t dance along the culture’s fault lines and don’t have any big surprises in store,” Frank Bruni writes.
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

Roy Cooper’s Senate campaign may offer Democrats “a lesson about the effectiveness of politicians who don’t fashion themselves as revolutionaries, don’t dance along the culture’s fault lines and don’t have any big surprises in store,” Frank Bruni writes.

item.title: Officials have identified the suspect who threw an incendiar…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Officials have identified the suspect who threw an incendiary device and set a fire outside of a federal building in New York City as a 43-year-old Army veteran. https://cnn.it/4bBzEyV
item.content:encoded: Officials have identified the suspect who threw an incendiary device and set a fire outside of a federal building in New York City as a 43-year-old Army veteran. https://cnn.it/4bBzEyV

item.title: Paige Bueckers leaves game after collision, hitting head on …
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Paige Bueckers leaves game after collision, hitting head on floor reut.rs/4gP5gEL
item.content:encoded: Paige Bueckers leaves game after collision, hitting head on floor reut.rs/4gP5gEL

item.title: US President Donald Trump said Israeli Prime Minister Benjam…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: US President Donald Trump said Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu will not be arrested when he visits the US, after New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he was still considering the move reut.rs/4aZseW3
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu will not be arrested when he visits the US, after New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he was still considering the move reut.rs/4aZseW3
